result.text: Large transport: a passenger bus, {n:12-48} souls aboard, each mid-story. Destination plate reads {pick:DOWNTOWN|EXPRESS|CHARTER}. Sample the collective mood, or scan the driver?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

mood.text: Mood sample: {n:20-60} percent commute-resigned, {n:10-30} percent audiobook-content, one passenger inexplicably euphoric. Investigate the euphoric one?

euphoric.text: Findings: they just got the job. THE job. They haven't told anyone yet — except, unknowingly, us. Their secret is safe, Captain. Congratulations, stranger.

letbe.text: Correct call. Unexplained joy should be left running. It's self-charging.

driver.text: Driver analysis: {n:8-30} years of service, thermos at 60 percent, patience at levels our instruments can't measure. A quiet master of the craft.
